macro_segments.title: The Requirement of a Mizbeach: Whether an Altar Structure Is Required for Offering Outside

micro_segments.title: Rabbi Yosi's Position: Mizbeach Required—Based on Noach Building an Altar

macro_segments.title: The Components of a Mizbeach: Whether Horns, Ramp, Base, and Square Shape Are Required

micro_segments.title: The Question: What Defines a Mizbeach for Purposes of Bamot and Shchutei Chutz
Answer: Components Required for Large Communal Bamot; Not for Private Bamot
Conclusion: Private Bamot Need Not Have These Components; Therefore No Requirement for Chiyuv
